barb.title: Frenzy Barbarian
points: Massive single-target physical DPS with dual-wield attacks
Battle Orders provides +life and +mana to both players
Natural tank with high life, defense, and life leech
Howl scatters trash mobs, letting Zon focus fire
Boss killer — Frenzy shreds act bosses and superuniques

zon.title: Java Amazon
points: Lightning Fury melts entire screens of monsters instantly
Charged Strike has highest single-target DPS in the game
Covers Lightning Immune gaps with physical jab damage
Valkyrie and Decoy provide additional tanking/distraction
Crowd control queen — clears density the Barb can't reach

combined.summary: Battle Orders buffs both characters' survivability. The Barb tanks and kills bosses while the Zon devastates crowds. Together they cover physical and lightning damage types, only struggling against rare Physical + Lightning Immune combos.
